eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Idaho; Malheur, OR; Lincoln, MT; Spokane, WA; at 4:37 AM on AUG 19, 2019 Effective until 6:37 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Amber Alert System.  This is the Idaho State Communications Center. We have just received this important information regarding a child abducted in Blackfoot City, Bingham County. The Bannock County Sheriff is looking for a child who was last seen in the Blackfoot area and is believed to be in danger. The child's name is Karsyn Avery Skinner. She is a 4 year old, female with black/brown hair and was last seen wearing pink capris, a yellow tank top, and purple sketchers. Authorities say that the child may be in the company of Sarah Walker, a 37 year old female and Robert Thomas, a 31 year old male.  They may be traveling in a maroon 1995 Ford Contour, Idaho license number 1B Z6213 that was last seen heading from Blackfoot to Pocatello. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child, please contact Bannock County Sheriff at 208-236-7111 immediately.
